# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['java', 'nodejs', 'python', 'dotnet', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select the project type for default configurations'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom build command(s) to execute. Leave empty to use default for selected project type. Separate multiple commands with semicolons (;)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom test command(s) to execute. Leave empty to use default for selected project type. Separate multiple commands with semicolons (;)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom deployment command(s) to execute. Leave empty to skip deployment. Separate multiple commands with semicolons (;)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRE_BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Commands to run before the build step (e.g., installing dependencies, setting up environment)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'POST_BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Commands to run after the build step (e.g., packaging, archiving artifacts)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Working directory relative to workspace root'
        )
        text(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Environment variables to set (one per line, format: KEY=VALUE)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test execution stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deployment stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DEBUG_MODE',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Enable debug mode with verbose output'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Glob pattern for archiving build artifacts (e.g., target/*.jar, dist/**/*). Leave empty to skip archiving.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_REPO_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Git repository URL to clone. Leave empty to use the pipeline SCM configuration.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_BRANCH',
            defaultValue: 'main',
            description: 'Git branch to checkout'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES',
            defaultValue: '30',
            description: 'Pipeline timeout in minutes'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD = ''
        DEFAULT_TEST_CMD = ''
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        timeout(time: "${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES ?: '30'}".toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Pipeline Initialization"
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Project Type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Deploy: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Debug Mode: ${params.DEBUG_MODE}"

                    // Set defaults based on project type
                    switch(params.PROJECT_TYPE) {
                        case 'java':
                            env.DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD = 'mvn clean package -DskipTests'
                            env.DEFAULT_TEST_CMD = 'mvn test'
                            break
                        case 'nodejs':
                            env.DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD = 'npm install && npm run build'
                            env.DEFAULT_TEST_CMD = 'npm test'
                            break
                        case 'python':
                            env.DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD = 'pip install -r requirements.txt && python setup.py build'
                            env.DEFAULT_TEST_CMD = 'python -m pytest tests/ -v'
                            break
                        case 'dotnet':
                            env.DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD = 'dotnet restore && dotnet build --configuration Release'
                            env.DEFAULT_TEST_CMD = 'dotnet test --configuration Release --no-build'
                            break
                        case 'custom':
                            env.DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD = 'echo "No default build command for custom project type. Please specify BUILD_COMMAND parameter."'
                            env.DEFAULT_TEST_CMD = 'echo "No default test command for custom project type. Please specify TEST_COMMAND parameter."'
                            break
                    }

                    // Resolve final commands
                    env.FINAL_BUILD_CMD = params.BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() ? params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim() : env.DEFAULT_BUILD_CMD
                    env.FINAL_TEST_CMD = params.TEST_COMMAND?.trim() ? params.TEST_COMMAND.trim() : env.DEFAULT_TEST_CMD
                    env.FINAL_DEPLOY_CMD = params.DEPLOY_COMMAND?.trim() ? params.DEPLOY_COMMAND.trim() : ''

                    echo "---------------------------------------------"
                    echo "Resolved Build Command: ${env.FINAL_BUILD_CMD}"
                    echo "Resolved Test Command: ${env.FINAL_TEST_CMD}"
                    echo "Resolved Deploy Command: ${env.FINAL_DEPLOY_CMD}"
                    echo "============================================="

                    // Parse and set custom environment variables
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS?.trim()) {
                        echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
                        params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS.trim().split('\n').each { line ->
                            def trimmedLine = line.trim()
                            if (trimmedLine && trimmedLine.contains('=')) {
                                def parts = trimmedLine.split('=', 2)
                                def key = parts[0].trim()
                                def value = parts[1].trim()
                                env."${key}" = value
                                echo "  Set: ${key}=${value}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            when {
                expression { return params.GIT_REPO_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Cloning repository: ${params.GIT_REPO_URL} (branch: ${params.GIT_BRANCH})"
                    git branch: params.GIT_BRANCH,
                        url: params.GIT_REPO_URL
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY ?: '.') {
                    script {
                        echo "============================================="
                        echo "Executing Pre-Build Commands"
                        echo "============================================="
                        def commands = params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND.trim()
                        if (params.DEBUG_MODE) {
                            echo "Commands: ${commands}"
                            sh """
                                set -ex
                                ${commands}
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ${commands}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY ?: '.') {
                    script {
                        echo "============================================="
                        echo "Executing Build Commands"
                        echo "============================================="
                        def buildCmd = env.FINAL_BUILD_CMD
                        if (params.DEBUG_MODE) {
                            echo "Commands: ${buildCmd}"
                            sh """
                                set -ex
                                ${buildCmd}
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ${buildCmd}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Build') {
            when {
                expression { return params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY ?: '.') {
                    script {
                        echo "============================================="
                        echo "Executing Post-Build Commands"
                        echo "============================================="
                        def commands = params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND.trim()
                        if (params.DEBUG_MODE) {
                            echo "Commands: ${commands}"
                            sh """
                                set -ex
                                ${commands}
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ${commands}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY ?: '.') {
                    script {
                        echo "============================================="
                        echo "Executing Test Commands"
                        echo "============================================="
                        def testCmd = env.FINAL_TEST_CMD
                        if (params.DEBUG_MODE) {
                            echo "Commands: ${testCmd}"
                            sh """
                                set -ex
                                ${testCmd}
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ${testCmd}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ARTIFACT_PATTERN?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY ?: '.') {
                    script {
                        echo "============================================="
                        echo "Archiving Artifacts: ${params.ARTIFACT_PATTERN}"
                        echo "============================================="
                        archiveArtifacts artifacts: params.ARTIFACT_PATTERN.trim(),
                                         allowEmptyArchive: true,
                                         fingerprint: true
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
                    expression { return env.FINAL_DEPLOY_CMD?.trim() }
                }
            }
            steps {
                dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY ?: '.') {
                    script {
                        echo "============================================="
                        echo "Executing Deployment Commands"
                        echo "============================================="

                        // Prompt for confirmation before deploying
                        try {
                            timeout(time: 5, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                                input message: "Proceed with deployment?",
                                      ok: 'Deploy',
                                      submitter: ''
                            }
                        } catch (err) {
                            echo "Deployment was aborted or timed out."
                            currentBuild.result = 'ABORTED'
                            error("Deployment cancelled by user or timeout.")
                        }

                        def deployCmd = env.FINAL_DEPLOY_CMD
                        if (params.DEBUG_MODE) {
                            echo "Commands: ${deployCmd}"
                            sh """
                                set -ex
                                ${deployCmd}
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ${deployCmd}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline completed SUCCESSFULLY"
            echo "============================================="
        }
        failure {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline FAILED"
            echo "============================================="
        }
        unstable {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline completed with UNSTABLE status"
            echo "============================================="
        }
        aborted {
            echo "============================================="
            echo "Pipeline was ABORTED"
            echo "============================================="
        }
        always {
            script {
                echo "---------------------------------------------"
                echo "Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
                echo "Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}"
                echo "Build Result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
                echo "Build Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}"
                echo "---------------------------------------------"
            }
            cleanWs(
                cleanWhenNotBuilt: false,
                deleteDirs: true,
                disableDeferredWipeout: true,
                notFailBuild: true
            )
        }
    }
}
